title: Dream Video
description: This isn’t just another modpack. It’s a full reimagining of Minecraft — optimized, animated, and refined for players who crave performance, realism, and pure style.
body:
## Dream-Style Manhunt Modpack (Unofficial)
This modpack is designed to recreate the intense, fast-paced experience of a Dream-style Minecraft Manhunt — all while enhancing visuals, performance, and player interaction.

Packed with performance-boosting mods like Sodium, Lithium, and ModernFix, as well as immersive visual upgrades such as Fresh Animations, Dramatic Skys, and 3D Skin Layers, this modpack balances smooth gameplay with cinematic aesthetics.

Voice chat support via Simple Voice Chat and tools like Dream’s Compass enable thrilling multiplayer chases, while mods like Zoomify, Advanced HUD, and AppleSkin give players the competitive edge.

**⚠️ Disclaimer:** This is an unofficial fan-made project. I am not affiliated with Dream or his team in any way. This modpack is simply inspired by his iconic Manhunt videos and built for those who want to experience that style of gameplay with friends.

Is for Fabric.

Ready to run, hide, and hunt? Jump in and make your own Manhunt moments.
